messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0092",
  "title": "法律声明",
  "page_index": 37,
  "page_range": "37"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0093",
    "title": "免责条款",
    "page_range": "37-38",
    "summary": "This section functions as a legal disclaimer and methodology statement, enabling retrieval for questions across the following categories:\n- **Topics:** Report disclaimer, data usage guidelines, liability boundaries, and issuer credentials/marketing claims.\n- **Entities:** 点点数据 (Diandian Data), 路透社 (Reuters), report analysts.\n- **Dates:** None specified.\n- **Definitions & Procedures:** How industry data and market forecasts are derived (desktop research, industry interviews, Diandian Data team product monitoring, and statistical prediction model estimation).\n- **Claims:** The report is strictly for reference/market research; Diandian Data assumes no legal responsibility for its data or viewpoints; all legal consequences and disputes from actions taken based on the report are borne solely by the user/actor. Additional claims include 100% data-driven selection for financing/cooperation, coverage by 200+ global media outlets, and long-tail traffic generation via white papers and official account articles.\n- **Tables & Figures:** None present.\n- **Metrics:** 100% (data-driven selection), 200+ (global media reports).\n- **Evidence Types:** Analyst research, industry interviews, monitored product data, statistical modeling, and third-party media coverage."
  }
]

message.content: This section (法律声明, page 37) functions as a legal disclaimer and methodology statement. It covers topics including report disclaimers, data usage guidelines, liability boundaries, and issuer credentials/marketing claims. Key entities mentioned are 点点数据 (Diandian Data), 路透社 (Reuters), and report analysts. No specific dates are provided. The section details definitions and procedures for deriving industry data and market forecasts, which rely on desktop research, industry interviews, Diandian Data team product monitoring, and statistical prediction model estimation. Core claims state that the report is strictly for reference and market research, with Diandian Data assuming no legal responsibility for its data or viewpoints; all legal consequences and disputes from actions taken based on the report are borne solely by the user. Additional claims highlight 100% data-driven selection for financing/cooperation, coverage by 200+ global media outlets, and long-tail traffic generation via white papers and official account articles. No tables or figures are present. Notable metrics include 100% (data-driven selection) and 200+ (global media reports). Evidence types referenced encompass analyst research, industry interviews, monitored product data, statistical modeling, and third-party media coverage.
